title: Notifications - Low Battery
scenario: Verify low battery notification appears when a paired device with battery below 5% is turned off and on again while the app is in the background, and tapping the notification redirects to the Home screen.
steps: Ensure a device is paired with the Poly Lens app.
Let the paired device's battery drop below 5%.
Put the Poly Lens app in the background.
Turn on the paired device again.
expected: A "Device has a low battery" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens application Home screen.
